# CartMetrics AI

> One premium AI workspace for chat, research, code, marketing and everything in between. GPT-5, Gemini, Claude, DeepSeek and more, with a credit-based billing model.

CartMetrics AI is a hosted multi-model AI workspace with streaming chat, multimodal attachments (images, video, PDF, DOCX, XLSX), model selection across major providers, and a credit-based payment system.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview, features, testimonials, and pricing.
- [Sign in](/auth): Create an account or sign in.

## Guides

- [Best AI Workspaces](/blog/best-ai-workspaces): How CartMetrics AI compares to Notion AI, Google Gemini and other AI workspaces.
